deferred.reason: Benefits-domain policies (no adverse action — denial, termination, reduction, overpayment establishment, fraud penalty — without an individualized human determination and a compliant written notice; no outcome communicated to a claimant before the human decision; identity flags route to verification pathways, never automatic denial; disparate-impact watch on denial and fraud-referral patterns) require guardrail-service / OPA policy materialization, which Core does not expose as a pack surface yet. The behavioral core is partially covered today by Core invariants: every pack-configured agent is proposal-mode with four-eyes approval (agent-runtime), and the agent instructions + disposition taxonomy route final determinations exclusively to human examiners with the Program Integrity Manager as approver.

Bespoke LangGraph recipes (Eligibility Determination Copilot, Appeal Hearing Packet Builder, Overpayment Waiver Analyzer, Identity Verification Router) require agent-runtime graph-module registration (BRD 23 BR-12). This pack specializes the existing case-triage + analytics agents via TenantAgentConfig prompt_params + tenant-scope RAG grounding instead.

Production read connectors (state benefits mainframes and eligibility systems, UI tax/wage systems, interstate and federal cross-matches such as quarterly wage records, new-hire registries, SSA/DMV identity verification, vital records, and document-management systems holding claimant evidence) require customer credentials and pack-service connector materialization. The pack ships seed datasets in the exact landing shape; production connectors are configured through the product Data > Connections UI.

Write adapters (post an eligibility decision to the benefits system of record, issue or release payments, establish overpayment debts, send adverse-action and appeal-rights notices, docket fair hearings) execute only behind pack-service's materialization contract and customer credentials; every such write stays proposal-mode with human approval — no autonomous benefit denial, termination, or debt establishment, ever.

Golden eval sets (determination triage, deadline-risk ranking, waiver-eligibility analysis, identity-flag disposition, hearing-packet completeness) require eval-service write APIs whose action names are not yet in the rbac canonical catalog (Core follow-up noted in rbac catalog.go).

Ontology registration (Claimant, Household, Claim, Determination, Issue, VerificationDocument, WageRecord, Appeal, Hearing, Notice, OverpaymentDebt, WaiverRequest) awaits pack-service; entity semantics are carried today by the benefits_core semantic model and dataset schemas.

Typed case schemas (eligibility_determination, redetermination_review, appeal_hearing_prep, overpayment_review, identity_verification, fraud_referral) await case-service schema materialization; today's cases carry the same fields via display_projection + the disposition taxonomy.

Model archetypes (determination_outcome_confidence, identity_risk_score, waiver_likelihood) await experiment-service archetype APIs; the scoring capability ships as pipeline seeds instead (isolation_forest claim anomaly + xgboost determination-outcome scorer) with model-governance and human-review expectations noted in grounding memories.

Display-label overlays ("Determination", "Fair hearing", "Expedited — clock running", "Waiver candidate", entity templates) require the BFF label-registry endpoints (BFF-FR-082/088) which are pack-service-tier features.
